name: Swedish Ginger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the corn syrup for 1 minute.
2. Cool slightly.
3. Add sugar, butter, cream, and spices to the cooled mixture.
4. Dissolve baking soda in 2 tablespoons of cream.
5. Combine this with the first mixture.
6. Blend in the sifted flour.
7. Refrigerate the dough.
8. Roll out the dough and cut into desired shapes.
9. Place on greased cookie sheets.
10. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 15 minutes, depending on size and thickness of cookies.
